description.para: Register offsets for the 16450/16550 compatible UART device.

briefdescription.para: An errored byte is in FIFO.
Errors except FIFO error and break detected.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to select the specific register.

simplesect.para: The value read from the register.
C-Style signature: u32 XUartNs550_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset);

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to select the specific register.
is the value to be written to the register.

simplesect.para: C-Style signature: u32 XUartNs550_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 RegisterValue);

briefdescription.para: Get the UART Line Status Register.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.

simplesect.para: The value read from the register.

briefdescription.para: Get the UART Line Status Register.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.

simplesect.para: The value read from the register.

briefdescription.para: Set the UART Line Status Register.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
is the value to be written to the register.

simplesect.para: C-Style signature: void XUartNs550_SetLineControlReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegisterValue);

memberdef.name: XUartNs550_EnableIntr
memberdef.initializer: XUartNs550_WriteReg((BaseAddress), XUN_IER_OFFSET, \ XUartNs550_ReadReg((BaseAddress), XUN_IER_OFFSET) | \ (XUN_IER_RX_LINE | XUN_IER_TX_EMPTY | XUN_IER_RX_DATA))

briefdescription.para: Enable the transmit and receive interrupts of the UART.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.

memberdef.name: XUartNs550_DisableIntr
memberdef.initializer: XUartNs550_WriteReg((BaseAddress), XUN_IER_OFFSET, \ XUartNs550_ReadReg((BaseAddress), XUN_IER_OFFSET) & \ ~(XUN_IER_RX_LINE | XUN_IER_TX_EMPTY | XUN_IER_RX_DATA))

briefdescription.para: Disable the transmit and receive interrupts of the UART.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.

briefdescription.para: Determine if there is receive data in the receiver and/or FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.

simplesect.para: TRUE if there is receive data, FALSE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Determine if a byte of data can be sent with the transmitter.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.

simplesect.para: TRUE if a byte can be sent, FALSE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a data byte with the UART.

detaileddescription.para: This function operates in the polling mode and blocks until the data has been put into the UART transmit holding register.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the UART.
contains the data byte to be sent.

briefdescription.para: This function receives a byte from the UART.

detaileddescription.para: It operates in a polling mode and blocks until a byte of data is received.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the UART.

simplesect.para: The data byte received by the UART.

briefdescription.para: Set the baud rate for the UART.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the UART.
is the frequency of the input clock to the device in Hertz.
is the baud rate to be set.
